note: Reconciliation registry (SCALE_PLAN §4) — Soviet. See de.json. Soviet formation ordinals are extensive (the 2nd Rifle Division had four formations, the 18th five — Wikidata encodes each as a same-name QID item with its own dates) but splitting the boevoi-sostav active entity per formation needs an authoritative reformation source: the active-army gap signal over-predicts (271/626 divisions show a >=4-month gap, mostly refit not reformation), so it is NOT auto-applied. Candidates are listed in reports/registry-su.txt for curation. Guards divisions are separately numbered and must NOT be merged with the line division of the same number.

2nd Shock Army.fate: encircled and destroyed in the Volkhov (Lyuban) pocket

2nd Shock Army.note: re-formed; later fought at Leningrad, Narva and in East Prussia (2nd formation not separately modelled)
